purpose: Mandate 14/23 cost and latency baseline comparison for AIE1 product-review server.
method: Comparative evaluation of 6 normal cases running sequentially. Baseline (Before Cache) is compared against Cold Cache and Hot Cache runs.

before_caching_baseline.description: Baseline without caching. All requests invoke candidate and judge models.

after_caching_cold.description: First run after caching integration. Populates cache for subsequent runs.

after_caching_hot.description: Subsequent runs. Cache hits serve direct responses (4-6 ms) with 0 tokens. Cache policy bypasses incorrect answers to re-evaluate.

comparison_summary.cost_savings_pct: 83.3% reduction in LLM calls, tokens, and USD cost on Hot Cache runs
comparison_summary.token_savings: 11,491 tokens saved on Hot Cache run (13,788 baseline down to 2,297)
comparison_summary.latency_p95_change: Before: 3.4962s, After (Hot): 15.0109s (P95 is dominated by the single bypassed/unverified case that called Bedrock, while 5/6 requests took < 10ms)
